mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: oral ulcers, uveitis (blurred vision), meningeal involvement (meningitis)
gait disturbance, visual impairment (visual field defect, diplopia), fatigue
vestibular dysfunction (vertigo), schizencephaly (gait disturbance), optic nerve abnormalities (vision problems)
facial palsies (dysarthria, anarthria), ocular motor disorders (diplopia, nystagmus)
epilepsy, mental retardation, skin lesions (facial angiofibromas, ash leaf spots)
Bell's palsy (unilateral facial paralysis), herpes zoster oticus (ear pain, tinnitus)
joint hypermobility, easy bruising, gastrointestinal issues (vomiting, chronic sinusitis)
progressive neurological deterioration with signs of myelin loss and axonal damage, nystagmus, tremors
